notes: The first Vault readiness attempt found the dev Vault container sealed/unhealthy; restarting the dev container recovered sealed=false and credentials were reseeded.

Acme tenant create returned a duplicate-style 500 during the final tenant setup pass because it had already been created by an earlier setup attempt; the tenant registry list confirmed acme-corp, northwind, and tessera-collective are active.
Tokens were minted in memory from tenant-specific Vault signing keys for HTTP verification and were not written to evidence, docs, or env files.
Cross-tenant failures are structural JWT failures because the server verifies with the context tenant key before checking the token tenant claim.
The role architecture guide path named by the prompt is absent in this repo; FLOW-10 role map was defined from ROLE-ANALYSIS-BATCH-02.md and runtime route declarations.
